title: Wireframe AI Message Envelope
description: Every event on the NATS bus carries this wrapper. Never change root fields.

message_id.description: Unique identifier for this exact message (UUID v4)

session_id.description: Session identifier — groups all messages in one conversation

correlation_id.description: Correlation ID — links a chain of messages back to the original task. Root = original request UUID; children append '-N' suffixes.

topic.description: Routing key / topic. Determines which modules receive this. Format: namespace.noun.verb

payload.description: Typed payload — schema depends on topic. See topic-specific schemas.

schema_version.description: Schema version marker. Increment on breaking envelope changes.

timestamp.description: Unix seconds when the sender created this message.
